source: independent (non-author) pred-scout-coach-critic reviewing data/postgame/*.json coaching against the match facts; preference-based / ungrounded lines flagged; grounded rewrites applied back

3b299c1c-84af-42e2-9bc5-962582666f7b.quote: Trio of you (Goldilocks/Xeebs/Willy) on Murdock-carry, Bayle-offlane, Zinx-support, plus two randoms on TwinBlast mid and Grux jungle. The draft wasn't the problem: jungle was favored (Grux 51.5% into Yin), support even (Zinx 50.3%), and the three lanes only a hair behind on pred.gg — Murdock 48.4% into Sparrow, TwinBlast 48.5% into Fey, Bayle 47.6% into Steel. Roughly even on paper. You won the objective pit — mini-prime at 16, Orb Prime at 28 AND 42 — and still lost structures 6 to 14 and got out-damaged on buildings 57k to 125k. That's the whole game: prime buffs that never became towers. Two things bled it out. First, the two randoms fed — Grux 9 deaths (his norm is 3) and TwinBlast 6 (norm 2), 15 deaths between them, every one handing the map back while you held the buff. Second, damage profile: you're 4/5 physical, so one armor item blunts most of you, while Fey did 81k magic and exactly one of five of you bought magic resist. You poked, they sieged.
3b299c1c-84af-42e2-9bc5-962582666f7b.issue: wrong matchup tag — SOURCE marks Zinx vs Riktor unfavored (50.4%), not even (50.3%)
3b299c1c-84af-42e2-9bc5-962582666f7b.rewrite: Trio of you (Goldilocks/Xeebs/Willy) on Murdock-carry, Bayle-offlane, Zinx-support, plus two randoms on TwinBlast mid and Grux jungle. The draft wasn't far off: jungle was favored (Grux 51.5% into Yin), support a touch unfavored (Zinx 50.4% into Riktor), and the three lanes only a hair behind — Murdock 48.4% into Sparrow, TwinBlast 48.5% into Fey, Bayle 47.6% into Steel. Roughly even on paper. You won the objective pit — mini-prime at 16, Orb Prime at 28 AND 42 — and still lost structures 6 to 14. That's the whole game: prime buffs that never became towers. Two things bled it out. First, Grux fed 9 deaths (norm 3) and TwinBlast 6 (norm 2), 15 between them, every one handing the map back while you held the buff. Second, damage profile: you're 4/5 physical, so one armor item blunts most of you, and only one of five bought magic resist into a 3-magical comp. You poked, they sieged.

5819cd95-81b2-4531-ab33-6ad313887ac8.quote: Steel support, 0/7/7 and team-low 8.3k damage — you actually won the Phase lane at every checkpoint, but your only real spike (Warden's Faith ~21m) was the lone bright spot and Steel gave the team no sustain into their healer. This is exactly the game your Belica or Zinx changes.
5819cd95-81b2-4531-ab33-6ad313887ac8.issue: preference — steers to the player's other heroes (Belica/Zinx) instead of coaching the draft need
5819cd95-81b2-4531-ab33-6ad313887ac8.rewrite: Steel support, 0/7/7 and team-low 8.3k damage — you won the Phase lane at every checkpoint, but the draft brought no sustain into their Phase healer, which the team never answered. A sustain or anti-dive support is what this comp needed to hold the objective fights you lost.
